player_notes.luka doncic: Windhorst reports Lakers are in 'wait-and-see' mode on Luka's Grade 2 hamstring injury — status uncertain for upcoming game, significant doubt for availability.
player_notes.anthony edwards: Returned from hyperextended knee in Game 1 vs. Spurs, coming off the bench and scoring 18 points — monitor role/minutes restriction heading into Game 2.

game_notes.LAL vs OKC: Luka Doncic (Grade 2 hamstring) is questionable/unlikely — if out, Lakers' offensive load shifts heavily to remaining roster, boosting usage for other Lakers props and elevating SGA's scoring upside.

Treat as a primary injury concern for G6; his availability and any potential minutes restriction are the most critical variables in the DEN-MIN series.

He came off the bench (not starting), scored 18 points. Update the injury landscape to reflect his return status and note the bench role / minutes restriction context. Remove 'DNP/OUT' language and replace with active-with-monitoring status.
